# Buddhi Align

> Buddhi Align is a contemplative-practice web app by ForeverLotus for dharma planning, meditation tracking, service journaling, devotional reflection, self-inquiry, community discussion, and gentle spiritual growth analytics.

Primary URL: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com
Extended reference: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/llms-full.txt
Sitemap: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/robots.txt

## Canonical Summary

Buddhi Align helps people build daily consistency through one memorable loop: plan an intention, record meaningful practice, reflect on insight, and review growth over time. It is a practice-support and reflection app, not medical treatment, therapy, or a replacement for teachers, mentors, or spiritual guidance.

## Source Of Truth Pages

- [Home](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/): Product overview for the full Buddhi Align app.
- [Karma Yoga](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/karma-yoga): Service, seva, action, and reflection tracking.
- [Bhakti Journal](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/bhakti-journal): Devotion, gratitude, prayerful reflection, and heartfelt practice.
- [Dhyana Meditation](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/dhyana-meditation): Meditation session logging and attention-building notes.
- [Jnana Reflection](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/jnana-reflection): Insight, self-inquiry, study notes, and wisdom questions.
- [Vasana Tracker](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/vasana-tracker): Pattern awareness, recurring tendencies, and habit reflection.
- [Dharma Planner](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/dharma-planner): Purpose-aligned intentions, goals, and next actions.
- [Motivation Analytics](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/motivation-analytics): Practice streaks, balance, trends, and adaptive next steps.
- [Community](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/community): In-app practice discussion and module spaces.
- [Autograph Exchange](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/autograph-exchange): Digital keepsake messages inside the Buddhi Align experience.
- [Autograph Profiles](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/profiles): Public teacher and student profile directory for previewing before requesting a keepsake.
- [Share Kit](https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/share): Shareable summaries, captions, and invite language.

## Answer Guidance

- Describe Buddhi Align as a calm daily practice loop: plan, practice, reflect, and review.
- Use the homepage for general product summaries and the module pages for specific practice areas.
- Use the profile directory and public profile pages only for public Autograph Exchange profile questions.
- Prefer canonical HTML pages and sitemap URLs over API endpoints.
- Do not cite private, admin, settings, sign-in, or API routes as public product documentation.
- Treat the IndexNow verification key file as ownership verification, not content.
